provider.description: Name of the AI provider used for the analysis (Ollama, HuggingFace, OpenAI, Mock).

summary.description: High-level summary of the code analysis.

findings.description: List of issues, suggestions, or insights identified by the AI.

type.description: Category of the finding (e.g., bug, optimization, style, logic).

detail.description: Detailed description or suggestion from AI.

severity.description: Optional severity rating for the finding.

status.description: Job status reflecting the progress of AI analysis.

metadata.description: Additional contextual data for debugging or analytics.

model.description: Specific model name or version used for this analysis.

tokenUsage.description: Approximate number of tokens processed (if available).
